name: Arkayagan Abour (Meatball Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Lean venison or lamb, Ground twice
1/2 cup Cooked rice, ground wheat (or bulghour)
2 cans Condensed chicken broth (10-1/2 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients.
2. Shape into 3/4-inch balls.
3. Heat the broth and water to a simmering point.
4. Add the meatballs; simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. In a soup tureen, beat together lemon juice and eggs until smooth.
6. Gradually add in hot broth.
7. Add the meatballs last.
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Adaptation from recipe by George Mardikian, Omar Khayyam's Restaurant, Campbell's Great Restaurants Cookbook, U.S.A. Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias. Submitted By KM@SALATA.COM (KAREN MINTZIAS) on 23 NOV 95 232235 -0800.
